title: NACR-353 Middle-Aged Writer Keeps A Female Editor As A Pet Hijiri Maihara - Maihara Sei
description: Holy was entrusted with the charge of an elderly sensual novelist. When I received the manuscript and read it, I was struck by excitement that I had never experienced, and unknowingly my left hand went into the skirt. A novelist who is convinced that she will do so and takes a peek at it. Holy, who was drawn out of his nasty self who was sleeping in the depths of his heart, gradually began to be dominated by this elderly novelist.
